meta.title: MergeCore Pest Rules
meta.description: Pest-first rules for Laravel feature, HTTP, and unit tests: assertions, stability, factories, authorisation, and failure paths. Compatible with PHPUnit-style tests when patterns overlap.
meta.notes: Gate with pest: true when the project uses Pest; hosts may still apply analogous rules to PHPUnit tests.

scoring.normalisation: Per review unit (one test file or scoped diff), sum penalties for matched rules after optional quality_signal multiplier, then score = max(0, min(10, initial_score - min(sum_penalties, max_total_penalty_per_file))).

pest_specific.description: Optional host tuning: multiply penalties for rules in categories 'assertions' or 'authorization' when the file uses it()/test() without datasets where multiple cases are clearly needed.

interpretation.9_to_10: Tests meaningfully exercise behaviour: strong assertions, auth and failure paths, stable factories.
interpretation.7_to_8: Good baseline; tighten weak expects, add negative cases, reduce brittleness.
interpretation.5_to_6: Flaky or shallow: missing auth/failure coverage, vague assertions.
interpretation.0_to_4: Unsafe to rely on: critical paths or authorisation effectively untested.

rules.title: Weak assertion: boolean tautology or no behavioural check
rules.description: expect(true)->toBeTrue(), empty expect(), or assertions that cannot fail when production code breaks do not validate behaviour.

heuristics: Assertion does not reference outcome of act

rules.title: Weak assertion: HTTP status only
rules.description: assertOk() without asserting JSON shape, database state, or side effects misses regressions in payloads and permissions.

heuristics: Same test has no assertJson, assertDatabaseHas, or Event::assertDispatched

rules.title: Brittle test: hard-coded database ids or ordering
rules.description: Asserting id === 1 or assuming row order without orderBy breaks across parallel runs and fresh databases.

heuristics: Asserts on auto-increment without factory reference

rules.title: Brittle test: time without freezing
rules.description: Assertions against now(), today, or expiries without Carbon::setTestNow or travel helpers flake near midnight and in CI timezones.

rules.title: Missing edge case: empty or boundary input
rules.description: Happy path only for list/create/update leaves max length, zero quantity, and empty collection behaviour unverified.

heuristics: Single it() for complex action with no dataset
No assert for empty array, zero, or null where API accepts them

rules.title: Missing edge case: validation errors not asserted
rules.description: Mutation endpoints should assert 422 (or project convention) with field errors when input is invalid.

heuristics: Feature test hits POST/PUT with only valid payload cases

rules.title: Poor factory: missing states for important invariants
rules.description: Factories that always produce valid rows but never model suspended users, failed payments, or draft status miss realistic scenarios.

heuristics: Large model factory with only definition(), no suspended/inactive states
Required enum columns always same value

rules.title: Poor factory: uniqueness collisions under parallel test
rules.description: Fixed strings for unique columns (email, slug) cause random failures when tests run in parallel.

rules.title: No authorization coverage: protected route only tested as authorised user
rules.description: Feature tests that always actingAs() and assertOk miss guest redirects and forbidden responses.

heuristics: File uses actingAs or signIn but never assertForbidden/assertRedirectToLogin

rules.title: No authorization coverage: wrong role not tested
rules.description: Policy-driven actions need a user who lacks the ability, not only a user who has it.

heuristics: Only 'admin' or owner path tested; no peer user denied case

rules.title: No failure path: only happy path exercised
rules.description: Services and jobs should be tested when dependencies throw, validation fails, or external APIs return errors.

heuristics: Multiple it() blocks all assert success only
Job test never Http::fake sequence with 500

rules.title: No failure path: domain exception not expected
rules.description: Invalid state transitions should assert the project exception type or message, not only generic failure.

heuristics: Service method with guard clauses but tests only call valid transitions

examples.before: // only calls refund on paid order

rules.title: Weak outbound test: Http::fake without assertSent
rules.description: Faking HTTP without asserting URL, method, or payload allows silent contract drift.

rules.title: Database mutation without isolation strategy
rules.description: Tests that create models without RefreshDatabase, LazilyRefreshDatabase, or a documented alternative risk order-dependent failures.

rules.title: Strong pattern: datasets or table-driven cases
rules.description: with() datasets or it()->with() for validation matrices reduce duplication and document edge cases explicitly.
